summary: Iter 9 COMPLETE. Server-driven feature flag system covers all 9 SOTA surfaces + paywall_mode (none/soft/hard) + 7 onboarding flags. Pose Studio (InstantID any-scene) shipped iter 8. Home Quick Actions surface SOTA (Face Enhance / Outfit / Hairstyle). Settings Developer toggle for real-AI bypass. LAUNCH_CHECKLIST + CORE_USER_FLOW docs written.

completed.item: Hairstyle Try-On + outfit_swap analytics enum + Hinge tile
completed.details: GenerationStyle outfit_swap + hairstyle_swap enums. HairstylePickerView 6-style catalog (Nano Banana 2). ToolsHub Hairstyle + Hinge tiles. iOS 23/23 + backend 24/24.

completed.item: Pose Studio (InstantID any-scene) + Home Quick Actions surface SOTA
completed.details: Backend INSTANT_ID model + pose_image_url forwarded. AIModel enum gains NANO_BANANA_2/GPT_IMAGE_2/FACE_RESTORE/INSTANT_ID. PoseStudioView with 6 quick-start chips (Helicopter/Yacht/Rooftop/Mountain/Coffee/Concert). HomeView Quick Actions reorder photoPicker/faceEnhance/outfitStudio/hairstyle. Settings DEBUG-only 'Use Real AI' toggle bound to UserDefault. Backlog cleanup: rizzCoach/profileScore/myGallery quick actions removed.

completed.item: Server-driven feature flag system + LAUNCH checklist
completed.details: Backend FeatureFlags expanded +9 SOTA flags + paywall_mode + soft_paywall_after_uses + 7 onboarding flags + max_batch_models. Settings + feature_flags router updated. iOS FeatureFlagManager: 14 new Feature enum cases, struct + CodingKeys + defaults + isEnabled() switch coverage, PaywallMode enum, paywallMode + softPaywallAfterUses + onboardingMaxSteps + maxBatchModels computed properties. HomeView visibleQuickActions filter. ToolsHubView 6 SOTA tiles wrapped in `if featureFlags.isEnabled(...)`. backend/.env.example rewritten as comprehensive 30+ flag template. ServiceTests testFeatureFlags_persistAndRestore fixed for new struct fields (BUG-9). LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md updated; CORE_USER_FLOW.md written.

bugs_found.title: Generated photos drop URLs in production
Source images never uploaded to backend
Inline comment on S3_ENDPOINT_URL crashed StorageService
App crashes on launch (Firebase missing plist)
FirebaseStorage Storage.storage() fatal-errored on MainTabView render
ServiceTests bit-rot — FeatureFlags struct gained 18 fields, persistAndRestore initializer broken

next_focus: Run full test suite (backend + iOS) to verify iter 9 didn't regress
Apple Developer + Firebase + RevenueCat live keys (BLOCKERS in LAUNCH_CHECKLIST)
Feature flag admin endpoint (PATCH /api/v1/flags) for runtime toggles without restart
S3 bucket + IAM keys (currently presign falls back to dev placeholder)
